name: Project Setup
description: Runs project setup tasks on container creation: pnpm install for Node subdirectories, uv sync for Python subdirectories, copies .env example files, runs lefthook install, and runs direnv allow. Tools (pnpm, uv, lefthook, direnv) must already be available in the container.

nodeSubdirs.description: Space-separated list of subdirectories containing package.json to run 'pnpm install' in (relative to the workspace root).

pythonSubdirs.description: Space-separated list of subdirectories containing pyproject.toml to run 'uv sync' in (relative to the workspace root).

envFiles.description: Space-separated list of example:target pairs (e.g. 'ui/.env.local.example:ui/.env.local') to copy when the target does not yet exist.

lefthookInstall.description: Run 'lefthook install' in the workspace root during container creation. Requires lefthook to be available.

direnvAllow.description: Run 'direnv allow .' in the workspace root during container creation. Requires direnv to be available.
